title: God’s Knights Close In
description: On pages 3–5, this part follows Unknown person #1, Usopp, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
